name: BBQ Pork Roast
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sage, allspice, coriander, nutmeg, peppercorns, and season salt in a food processor. Pulse until the spices are well combined.
2. Pat the pork roast dry and press the spice mixture onto the fat cap of the roast.
3. Roast the pork in the dome of a barbecue grill using indirect heat. Alternatively, you can roast it directly under the grill with coals placed on either side of the pan. The cooking time should be about 90 minutes, until the internal temperature reaches 160°F.
4. During the last 30 minutes of roasting, combine applesauce and brown sugar in a bowl. Brush this mixture onto the top of the roast.
5. Continue roasting until the internal temperature reaches 170°F. Use all of the applesauce mixture.
6. Remove the roast from the grill and let it rest for 15 minutes before carving.
